specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We work with boat owners throughout South Florida and the surrounding waters, bringing hands-on expertise and a straightforward approach to every job we take on. Your boat is a serious investment, and we treat it that way.

At Ben's Boatworks, we offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services designed to cover every system on your vessel. Our boat surveying and inspection services give you a clear, honest picture of your boat's condition — whether you're buying, selling, or just staying on top of maintenance. We also handle diving and underwater services, getting eyes and hands on your hull, running gear, and underwater fittings without the hassle of a haul-out. When the heat or humidity becomes an issue aboard, our marine AC and climate control work keeps your cabin comfortable and your systems running efficiently. And for everything below the waterline inside the boat, our marine plumbing and sanitation services keep your onboard systems clean, functional, and compliant.

We serve boat owners across South Florida, working within a 60-mile radius of Annapolis, MD and reaching boaters in marinas, anchorages, and yards throughout the region. Whether you're a liveaboard, a weekend cruiser, or a serious offshore fisherman, we're here to help you stay on the water and out of the boatyard. We've built our reputation one job at a time, and we're committed to keeping it that way.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call for expert marine service today.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A thorough boat survey covers the structural integrity, mechanical systems, electrical components, and overall condition of your vessel — giving you an accurate, documented assessment before a purchase, insurance renewal, or major refit. Ben's Boatworks conducts detailed pre-purchase and condition-and-value surveys that help boat owners and buyers make informed decisions. Knowing exactly what you're working with is the first step to keeping any vessel safe and seaworthy.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater inspections, hull cleanings, zinc replacements, prop checks, and running gear assessments are all handled in the water — no haul-out required. Ben's Boatworks provides professional diving services to evaluate and maintain the underwater portions of your vessel, including through-hulls, shafts, rudders, and bottom paint condition. Staying on top of underwater maintenance protects your hull and keeps your boat performing the way it should.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning systems require specialized knowledge to install, service, and troubleshoot — saltwater environments are tough on components and refrigerant lines alike. Ben's Boatworks handles AC system repairs, maintenance, and diagnostics to keep your cabin comfortable and your equipment running efficiently through the hottest months. A properly functioning climate control system also helps manage onboard humidity, which protects your interior and electronics over time.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Onboard plumbing and sanitation systems — including holding tanks, marine heads, through-hulls, seacocks, and raw water systems — need to be reliable, leak-free, and up to current regulations. Ben's Boatworks services and repairs marine sanitation systems to keep your vessel compliant and your bilge dry. Whether it's a stubborn head, a failed seacock, or a complete sanitation overhaul, we handle the work that keeps your boat livable and legally sound.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for buyers
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement without haul-out
Marine AC system repair and seasonal climate control maintenance
Marine head replacement and holding tank system overhaul
Diving inspection of running gear, props, and underwater fittings
Through-hull and seacock inspection, service, or replacement
Insurance or damage survey following a grounding or collision
